## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 118, Firefox 119, Safari 17]
- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 13, MacBook Pro, Windows Desktop]
- **Screen Size**: [e.g. mobile, tablet, desktop]
- **Print Mode**: [if bug occurs during printing]

## Affected Features
- [ ] Playbook selector
- [ ] Character sheet builder
- [ ] Stress/consequence tracker
- [ ] Chrome picker
- [ ] Talent picker
- [ ] Dice roller
- [ ] Print export
- [ ] Other: ___

## Game Impact
- [ ] Prevents character creation
- [ ] Prevents gameplay tracking
- [ ] Cosmetic issue only
- [ ] Data loss potential

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
